_comment: Canonical example for the agent-profile-description change. Each entry in agent_servers is an AGENT PROFILE (persona + prompt + goal + description) that references a SERVER (command/args/env/cwd = the transport). Multiple profiles MAY share one server. The optional `description` field is surfaced in /acp agents, acp_status, acp_runtime_info, acp_doctor, and the agent-config TUI. NOTE: systemPrompt paths below use `~/` portable placeholders — replace with absolute paths on your machine.

claude.description: Claude Code via the official ACP adapter — general-purpose coding agent.

pi.description: Default pi coding agent — the workhorse for repo-local dev tasks.

verifier.description: Blind reviewer persona — gates work via the verifier-loop (≥2 unanimous approvals).

coder.description: Implementation-focused persona — writes GREEN-phase code from RED tests / plans.

browser-tester.description: E2E/browser persona — drives the abw skill for UI/UX verification.

red.description: Adversarial/red-team persona — finds edge cases, breaks assumptions, stress-tests designs.

general.description: Unscoped general assistant — inherits the global pi system prompt, no narrowed goal.
